prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "Hey Maria, since we last spoke I went to that community mtg. It was really interesting hearing everyone's worries and how it affects our area. It made me realize how crucial the upgrades are, especially for the kids. I'm really upset seeing the state of our education. How do you think we can make things better?"
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "Hey John, cool that you made it. You're right, it's really sad to see the state of education. We should fight for more money and resources for schools and raise awareness about the importance of education. It's not just for our kids, but for all of us too!"
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "Yup, education is essential for a successful society. I totally agree that we should fight for more money and resources for our schools. It breaks my heart that our kids don't have the proper stuff they need. They deserve better."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "Yeah, John. Our kids are our future; they should have the best. It kills me to think about all the kids without the proper stuff they need. It's just not right."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "It's definitely isn't, Maria. My kids have so much and others don't. We really need to do something about it."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "Sure, it's not right that some kids get all they need while others have nothing to help them succeed. We gotta do something! Last week I volunteered at a shelter during an event for kids, and it's been a great experience."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "Wow, Maria! That's really making a big impact. What made you decide to get involved with that?"
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "I started volunteering to help make a difference. My aunt believed in volunteering, and used to help my family out when we were struggling, so I'm inspired by her. It makes me happy knowing I can brighten somebody's day."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "Wow, Maria. That's amazing! I can imagine it's incredibly rewarding. Is there a particular moment that stands out to you as the most impactful?"
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "For me, it was when I noticed a little girl around 8 sitting all alone. She seemed so sad. So, I sat with her and we talked. Turns out she had no other family - it broke my heart. I was able to give her some comfort and a listening ear. We ended up laughing and having a good time."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "Wow, what a touching moment, Maria. I'm glad you were there for her when she needed someone. I'm sure it made a big impact."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "That's nice of you, John. What's the photo about?"
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "It reminds me of something from my childhood. I had a little doll like this and it always made me feel better. It reminds me to always look out for others, especially when they're feeling down."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "That's sweet. Spreading kindness and support can really make a difference, especially when someone is feeling down. Thanks for sharing."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] John said: "No problem, Maria. It's important to support each other when we're feeling down. You never know the difference a kind gesture can make."
[1:17 pm on 28 January, 2023] Maria said: "Yep, kindness is key and a little compassion can really turn someone's day around. So glad we're on the same page here.""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
